description: Risk Radar - defensive desk. Scores the S&P 500 on five fundamental-deterioration axes (solvency, earnings, analyst exodus, momentum, overvaluation) and splits short candidates from avoid names. Output data/risk-radar.json.

eventbridge_scheduler.description: Risk Radar fundamental-deterioration screen - daily 14:30 UTC via Amazon EventBridge Scheduler. The classic EventBridge 300-rule pool is saturated; Scheduler is the go-forward scheduling path.
